这是一款浏览器上的多功能效率工具

它是浏览器上可以提升效率的工具平台，可以在任何网页上弹窗输入命令和内容进行一些便携操作。

比如：快速操作浏览器功能、关闭多余标签、多个搜索引擎搜索、快速打开文档编写内容、内置 1000+ 常用网站快速打开。

Turning your tab chaos into a better break, one KitKat at a time.

Overworked? Overwhelmed? Too many open tabs?
KitKat Tab Break is here to save your sanity (and your browser’s RAM).

You don’t need to work hard to close your tabs. Go back easily to pressure-free, lag-free browsing experience with KitKat Tab Break. Whenever it detects too many open tabs, it turns the next one into a mini game where you can close your tabs by virtually breaking KitKats one by one.

Even better, you get rewarded for taking a break! The more tabs you close, the bigger your KitKat discount!

Have a (Tab) Break. Have a KitKat.

What it does:
Detects the number of open tabs, gamifies the tab-closing experience, and tracks how many tabs you’ve closed.

Where it works:
Your Chrome browser that’s on a verge of a meltdown.
SponsorKliks is a free sponsor concept for sport clubs and other non-profits.

Download eenmalig de SponsorKliks Extensie en vergeet nooit meer jouw favoriete vereniging/stichting te sponsoren. 

Gebruik alleen deze door de meewerkende webwinkels geautoriseerde browserextensie!

Andere browserextensies worden NIET door SponsorKliks ondersteund/goedgekeurd en dus ook niet door de webwinkels die in deze (ongeautoriseerde) extensies zijn opgenomen! 

Door een eigen browserextensie voor jouw vereniging/stichting te maken loop je het risico dat SponsorKliks genoodzaakt is de samenwerking met de betreffende vereniging/stichting te staken. Download dus alleen deze "legale" browserextensie!

LET OP! Wanneer je naar een andere pagina gaat dan de homepage van de webwinkel (dus bijvoorbeeld naar een productpagina binnen deze webwinkel), dan zal deze extensie jouw bezoek doorsturen naar de homepage van de betreffende webshop. 

Dit is helaas niet anders in te stellen. U dient dus daarna nogmaals de betreffende pagina binnen de webshop te bezoeken.
Find, manage, and automate your browser with the speed of thought. A workflow designed for focus.

🚀 Your browser's command center. Find anything, do everything, never leave the keyboard.

  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  ✨ WHAT IT DOES

  • Instant search across tabs, history, and bookmarks
  • Smart commands: close duplicates, group tabs, clear history
  • Keyboard-first: Cmd+Shift+K opens, Escape closes
  • Lightning fast: 50ms response, zero lag

  ⚡ WHY YOU NEED IT

  Stop hunting through 100+ tabs. Stop losing important pages. Stop breaking your flow.
  One shortcut. Every tab. Every bookmark. Every command. Instantly.

  🎯 KEY FEATURES

  ► Universal Search - Find anything with fuzzy, typo-tolerant search
  ► Power Commands - Execute actions like "close duplicates" without touching the mouse
  ► Smart Prefixes - Use 't' for tabs, 'h' for history, 'b' for bookmarks
  ► Privacy First - 100% local, zero data collection
  ► Blazing Fast - Instant results as you type

  💡 PERFECT FOR

  • Developers with documentation overflow
  • Researchers managing resources
  • Power users who live in the keyboard
  • Anyone with too many tabs

  ⌨️ HOW TO USE

  1️⃣ Press Ctrl+Shift+K (Cmd+Shift+K on Mac)
  2️⃣ Type what you're looking for
  3️⃣ Press Enter to go
  4️⃣ Press Escape to close

  That's it. No setup. No account. No tracking.

  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  🔒 100% Privacy • ⚡ 50ms Speed • 🎯 0 Configuration

  Built for professionals who demand speed.

A powerful Chrome extension designed to enhance your browsing experience by providing advanced bookmark and history management capabilities and search, along with innovative sharing features so you can share your bookmarks and history with others and quickly access them via your mobile phone.

Key Features:

1. Advanced Bookmark Management
- Advanced search and filtering capabilities
- Intelligent bookmark organization and categorization
- Quick access to frequently visited sites
- Customizable bookmark collections
- Favicon support for visual recognition
- Seamless integration with Chrome's native bookmarking system

2. Enhanced History Management
- Comprehensive browsing history management
- Advanced search and filtering capabilities
- Allow adding history items to bookmarks
- Top sites tracking for quick access

3. Smart Link Management & Sharing

Perfect For

Real-Time Metrics That Matter:

✓  Live Bitcoin Price Updates

Beautiful sticky notes reminder board as your new tab.

Turn every new tab into your warm paper & ink sticky-note planner.

Sticky Reminders replaces your default new tab with a beautiful, functional sticky-note board. Real reminders with due dates, repeating tasks, quick timers, scratchpad notes, and floating toast alerts that appear on any webpage.

Features

Visual sticky-note board with tilt, gold accents & warm aesthetic
Smart columns: Today • This Week • This Month • Repeating
Built-in Quick Timers with live countdowns
Floating on-screen toasts appear on ANY tab (YouTube, Gmail, etc.)
Push notifications + floating toasts work even when Chrome is closed
Two workspaces: Office 🏢 + Private 🔒
Repeating reminders (daily, weekly, monthly, custom)
Scratchpad notes with colour picker
Dark mode + top sites bar + snooze + export/import

How it compares

Vs Momentum: Momentum gives pretty backgrounds and basic to-dos. Sticky Reminders gives you real due dates, columns, repeating reminders, quick timers & floating alerts on every page.

Vs Todoist: Todoist is a powerful task list in a popup. Sticky Reminders is a full-screen visual sticky-note planner that lives in your new tab.

Privacy-first: Everything stays on your device. No account. No cloud. No tracking.

Perfect for students, freelancers and busy professionals who want a calm, beautiful and actually useful new-tab experience.

Replace your new tab with Sticky Reminders and finally feel organised.

A website blocker to prevent distractions. You can allow yourself access to a distracting site for a minute.

A website blocker to prevent distractions. You can allow yourself access to a distracting site for a minute, then the extension will ask you to close the tab. Extension compatible with "ShinyTimer", a gadget that connects via bluetooth to Chrome and sends requests to this extension.

Your favorites when you need them, out of the way when you don't.

DynamicFavorites replaces the built-in favorites bar with one that stays hidden until you need it. Move your mouse to the top of the page and it slides into view. You get full access to your bookmarks without the clutter.

What it does:

• Hide-on-demand bar that appears on hover (with adjustable trigger area and delay)
• Display your existing bookmarks and folders
• Open folders on hover or click (your choice)
• Drag and drop to reorganize, including dropping URLs from the address bar to create new bookmarks
• Right-click for quick actions: open, open all, rename, delete
• Rename bookmarks directly from the bar
• Access your browser's native favorites manager with one click

Optional new tab page:

The extension includes a new tab page override (off by default). This exists so the favorites bar can appear on new tabs with the same look and behavior as on regular pages. The new tab page also includes a clock, search bar, top sites, and recently closed tabs.

If you use another new tab extension, install it after this one. The last-installed extension's new tab takes priority.

Customize to your taste:

• Bar height, spacing, and font size
• Animation speed and transition behavior
• Full-width or content-width bar, with alignment and corner radius options
• Light, dark, or system theme
• Visibility toggle for the manage button
• New tab: clock format, search engine, number of top sites and recent tabs

About this extension:

This is a personal extension I built for myself, so it is highly opinionated. Sharing it in case others would find it useful. Feedback or ideas are appreciated, but unless I find a use for it myself, I would not want to feature creep the extension.

Changelog:

v1.0.5
• Smoother drag-and-drop: live reorder animations, drag-into-folder support
• Toggle animations on/off in settings

v1.0.4
• Fixed middle-click on a folder accidentally firing inside nested subfolders

v1.0.3
• Site blacklist: disable the bar on specific sites
• New "Manage" menu: add the current page, create folders, disable site, open favorites manager
• Drag URLs from the address bar onto the bar to save them

v1.0.2
• Bar now (in most cases) hides properly on pages with iframes (Google Docs, Office 365)
• Confirmation prompt when opening a folder with many links at once
• Various UI polishes

v1.0.1
• New Tab page override with clock, search, top sites, and recent tabs
• Fixed settings occasionally failing to load on first install
• Better detection of fast mouse movement into the trigger zone

v1.0.0
• Initial release

Have you ever wondered what websites you visit most frequently or how much time you spend online ? Or how many times you've clicked? No? That's okay because I made this anyway!

🎮 Style: ClickClount tracks and records your internet stats the same way many video games do. I've always been a fan of total stats collected by video game

📊 Stats: Track the number of pages visited, mouse clicks, and time spent online to gain an understanding of your internet habits.

🌐 Most Visited Page: Discover which website dominates your online presence and the number of visits it receives via the Google API topSites.

🧹 Clear All: Start over again with the Clear All button

🏆 Achievements (COMING SOON): Unlock achievements based on your internet usage milestones. Celebrate your digital accomplishments!

🔒 Privacy First: ClickCount is built to respect your privacy. All data is stored locally (I don't have access to it whatsoever), ensuring your browsing habits remain private.

🔗 Web Navigation & More: ClickCount seamlessly integrates with web navigation, web requests, and more, providing a holistic browsing experience.

This is my very first deployed web app, I built this to practice JavaScript, HTML, CSS and to familiarize myself with Google's APIs. I had a lot of fun creating this small application and hope to push the needle a little further with each consecutive project. 

📧 Contact Information: If you have any questions or find any issues please feel free to email me @Alanvnorcott@gmail.com or go through my LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alan-norcott-31161523b/

Thanks for checking this out!

- Alan

Nvimux brings (n)vim-style keyboard navigation to Chrome.
Navigate the web entirely with your keyboard using familiar keybindings.

Features:
- Scroll with j/k, jump to top/bottom with g/G, half-page with Ctrl+D/U
- Hop mode (Ctrl+E) — jump to any link with color-coded hints
- Page find (Ctrl+F) and web search (Ctrl+G) with history & suggestions
- Workspace (Ctrl+W), tab delete (Ctrl+X), change tabs (;)
- Tab history navigation with Ctrl+I / Ctrl+O
- Tab switching with Ctrl+H / Ctrl+L
- Link navigation with Ctrl+J / Ctrl+K

All navigation runs locally — no data is collected or sent anywhere.
The most powerful notes extension. Rich text, tags, search, TTS, speech-to-text, focus mode, and more.

Quick Notes is a complete notes & web-highlight workspace — right in your browser. No accounts, no servers, no telemetry. Everything stays in your browser's local storage.

WRITE NOTES YOUR WAY

• Rich-text editor with formatting, lists, code blocks and links
• Tags, colors, pinning and full-text search
• Reminders with browser notifications
• Focus mode for distraction-free writing
• Multiple views: popup, side panel, or full-tab editor
• Find & Replace, command palette, word wrap and line numbers
• Export single notes as TXT/HTML, or back up everything as JSON

LISTEN & DICTATE

• Text-to-speech: have any note read aloud
• Speech-to-text: dictate directly into the editor
• Uses your browser's built-in speech APIs — no third-party services

HIGHLIGHT THE WEB

• Mark any text on any web page in up to 7 colors
• Highlights survive page reloads and SPA re-renders
• Click a saved highlight in the popup to jump back to its source
• Saved highlights are re-anchored using context, not fragile DOM paths

WEB CLIPPER

• Right-click a selection → save as a new note with source title and URL
• Preserve basic formatting from the original page

NEW TAB PAGE (optional)

• Replace the new tab with a clock, your recent notes and most-visited sites
• Off by default — enable it in Settings when you want it

PRIVACY FIRST

Quick Notes stores notes, highlights, tags and settings locally in your browser. No analytics, no accounts, no remote servers, no advertising libraries. Your data leaves your device only when you choose to export it.
Browser Companion is a lightweight browser companion extension designed to help you understand and manage your web browsing…

Browser Companion is a lightweight browser companion extension designed to help you understand and manage your web browsing behavior.

It continuously tracks your active tabs and browsing activity, allowing you to gain insights into how you spend time online. By analyzing visited pages and frequently accessed websites, the extension helps you become more aware of your browsing patterns and improve productivity. 

1. Tracks currently open browser tabs

2. Monitors browsing history over time

3.  Identifies frequently visited (top) websites

4.  Uses notifications to keep you informed when needed

5. Securely stores data locally using Chrome storage

6. Runs efficiently using event-based background processing (Manifest V3)
Replace new tab page with a personal dashboard to help you get focused, stay organized, and keep motivated to achieve your goals.

eplace your browser's empty new tab with a personal dashboard that helps you stay focused, organized, and motivated every time you open a tab.

We open new tabs more than a hundred times a day. The first thing we see can shape our mood and how the next hour goes. New Tab Dashboard turns that empty page into a calm, useful space, your time, your tasks, your inspiration, all where you can see them.

Whether you are starting your day, jumping between tasks, or taking a quick breather, the dashboard gives you a single quiet view that keeps the things that matter close at hand and the noise of the open web one step away.

Key features

- Big, readable clock front and center, with 12 or 24 hour format
- World clock to track multiple time zones at once, with daylight saving handled automatically; archive cities you do not need today and bring them back later
- Countdown timers for trips, deadlines, birthdays, and launches; get a native browser notification when the moment arrives, and archive past countdowns to reuse them
- To-do lists with multiple lists, a Today and Inbox view, check items off with a click, and edit or delete inline
- Quick notes that save as you type, no save button needed
- Bookmarks at a glance, browse and open your existing browser bookmarks right from the new tab, or pick a single folder to surface
- Top sites, your most-visited sites are one click away
- Custom shortcuts and links you can add and pin to the sites you actually visit each day
- Search bar with multiple engines including Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Ecosia, and more, without leaving the new tab
- Live weather conditions for cities worldwide, covering 12,000+ cities across 188 countries; choose Celsius or Fahrenheit
- Daily focus goal, write down one thing that matters today and keep it visible
- Balance mode, set your uptime and downtime hours so your day has a healthy rhythm of work and rest
- Motivational quotes from a curated library of classic and modern lines, with a rotating display; pin favorites and hide the ones that do not resonate
- Daily mantras to start each session with a phrase that anchors your intention; choose from a built-in library or write your own
- Beautiful backgrounds, pick from curated categories like Nature, Cities, Abstract, and Houses, or upload your own images
- Smart text contrast, the dashboard chooses a text color that stays readable on any background

Customization

- Light and dark themes
- Multiple font families and sizes
- Use your own photos as backgrounds
- Add and edit your own mantras, quotes, to-do lists, and notes
- Pin or favorite the items you want to keep coming back to
- Archive countdowns and world clocks instead of deleting them
- Show or hide every widget independently, including clock, world clock, countdown, links, notes, search bar, to-do, quotes, mantras, photos, weather, balance, and focus goal
- Adjustable text color overlay so the dashboard stays readable on any background

Optional account, optional sync

- All of your dashboard data stays in your browser by default
- Create an account only if you want your settings, custom mantras, quotes, to-do lists, and uploaded photos to follow you across devices
- Passwords are hashed before they are stored, never kept in plain text
- Sign out at any time; your local data on the current device remains untouched

Privacy first

- No advertising, no advertising trackers, no third-party analytics
- Bookmarks and top sites are read locally and never sent to any server
- The extension never asks for your geolocation; the weather widget works from a city name you choose
- No browsing history is read or transmitted
- A full privacy policy is published with the listing

How it works

- Install the extension and open any new tab, the dashboard takes over the new tab page
- Open settings from the sidebar; every widget can be enabled, disabled, or rearranged
- Sign in if you want sync across browsers and devices, or stay local; both work fully
- Send feedback any time from the help section

Who it is for

- People who want a calmer start to every tab instead of a search bar and a blank page
- Anyone juggling tasks, notes, and links across the day who wants them in one consistent place
- Travelers and remote teams tracking multiple time zones
- Anyone who likes a small daily nudge, a beautiful photo, or a thought worth reading first thing

Make your new tab page a powerful and personalized hub for productivity and inspiration. Install New Tab Dashboard today and turn every blank tab into a moment that works for you.
Displays bookmarks and the top sites that you visit on a page with a clickable card-like structure
Displays bookmarks that you bookmarked and the top sites that you visit on a new tab with a clickable card-like structure
AI tab manager: smart grouping, tab snooze, spaces, focus mode, AI search & summarize, dark mode.

SmartTab — The smartest way to manage your browser tabs.

  Tired of tab chaos? SmartTab uses AI to help you organize, find, and manage your tabs effortlessly.

  🗂 TAB MANAGEMENT
  • Smart Group — Auto-organize tabs by category (Social, Video, Dev, Shopping...)
  • Group by Site — Group tabs from the same website
  • Auto-Group — Automatically groups new tabs as you browse
  • Close Duplicates — Find and close duplicate tabs instantly
  • Bulk Actions — Select multiple tabs to close, snooze, or save at once
  • Tab Age Indicator — See how long each tab has been open

  🔍 SEARCH & FIND
  • Instant Search — Find any tab across all windows
  • Quick Commands — Type "/" for power-user commands
  • Keyboard Navigation — Arrow keys + Enter to switch tabs fast

  🤖 AI FEATURES (Pro)
  • AI Search — Ask questions about your open tabs
  • AI Summarize — Get quick summaries of any page
  • AI Tab Rename — Clean up messy tab titles automatically

  📁 SPACES & COLLECTIONS
  • Create custom Spaces to organize tabs by project
  • Save & restore tab collections with one click
  • Schedule Spaces to open automatically on specific days

  ⏰ TAB SNOOZE
  • Snooze tabs for later — 30 min, 1 hour, tomorrow, or pick a custom time
  • Tabs reopen automatically when the time comes

  📖 READING LIST
  • Save tabs to read later
  • Track read/unread status

  🎯 FOCUS MODE
  • Hide all tabs except your current task
  • Eliminate distractions, boost productivity

  💾 SESSIONS
  • Save your current tabs as a session
  • Restore sessions anytime
  • Auto-save sessions daily (Pro)

  📊 STATS & INSIGHTS
  • See your tab count, top sites, duplicates
  • Memory usage estimates with one-click suspend
  • Time per site tracking (Pro)

  🔊 AUDIO DETECTION
  • See which tabs are playing sound
  • Mute/unmute tabs directly from the popup

  🖥 FULL DASHBOARD
  • Drag & drop tab management in a full-page view
  • Visual overview of all your tabs as cards

  ⌨️ KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS
  • Ctrl+Shift+S — Open SmartTab
  • Ctrl+Shift+G — Smart Group
  • Ctrl+Shift+B — Open Dashboard
  • Fully customizable in Chrome settings

  🌙 DARK MODE
  • Easy on the eyes, beautiful in both light and dark

  💾 EXPORT & IMPORT
  • Backup all your data as JSON
  • Restore on any device

  🔒 PRIVACY
  • Your data stays local — we never collect or sell your information
  • AI features use secure, encrypted connections
  • No tracking, no analytics, no ads

  SmartTab is free with optional Pro upgrade for AI-powered features.

leadgen companies needing for contact info
